scripts/workspace-watchdog.sh.reason: Same relative path exists in both script trees with content drift; a later PR must review before syncing or porting.

scripts/workspace.ts.reason: Byte-identical in packages/workspace and packages/os; keep monitored so later drift becomes visible.

scripts/workspace/consuelo-workspace-sna.reason: Present only in packages/os as migration-local OS runtime, install, cloud, test, or generated-support behavior; do not delete during parity audit.

Ko.preferredReplacement: the user or a configured user display name
Ko.reason: Personal founder shorthand should become role-neutral copy before OS is distributed beyond the current operator environment.

Kokayi.preferredReplacement: a configured user name or owner identity
Kokayi.reason: Personal names make scripts non-portable and should be classified before later replacement work changes behavior.

kokayi.preferredReplacement: a configured username, home owner, or account slug
kokayi.reason: Lowercase personal identifiers often appear in paths or handles and need context-aware replacement in a later PR.

@kokayi.preferredReplacement: a configured GitHub or workspace user handle
@kokayi.reason: Personal social handles should become configurable ownership metadata before standalone OS usage expands.

/Users/kokayi.preferredReplacement: the current user home directory from HOME or os.homedir()
/Users/kokayi.reason: Absolute local Mac paths break standalone installs on other machines and must be replaced carefully in later work.

consuelohq/opensaas.preferredReplacement: a configured repository slug for the active workspace
consuelohq/opensaas.reason: Repository slugs should be configurable where OS behavior can run outside the source repository migration environment.

opensaas.preferredReplacement: a repo or package identifier only where local source identity is intended
opensaas.reason: The historical repository name is still valid in some package contexts but needs classification before portability rewrites.

SUPABASE_URL.preferredReplacement: an optional remote context backend URL env var
SUPABASE_URL.reason: Supabase must remain optional remote or sync behavior, and missing env should not break standalone SQLite usage.

SUPABASE_KEY.preferredReplacement: an optional remote context backend key env var
SUPABASE_KEY.reason: Supabase credentials must be optional and absent credentials should keep standalone local SQLite behavior working.

stream/workspace.preferredReplacement: the configured stream branch or explicit user-provided stream
stream/workspace.reason: Workspace stream defaults should not leak into OS defaults without an explicit stream selection contract.

stream/workspace-agents.preferredReplacement: the configured agent stream branch or explicit user-provided stream
stream/workspace-agents.reason: Workspace-agent stream defaults are migration-era assumptions and need a follow-up OS manifest decision.

contextBackendContract.reason: Standalone OS must use local SQLite by default; Supabase is optional remote or sync behavior and missing Supabase env must not block local use.

manifestDrift.reason: Known manifest drift kept visible for a follow-up PR; this audit should classify the mismatch without rewriting tool behavior.
